case_title: ATLANTIC ELECTRONICS & TELECOM, INC. VS HASMUKH N. PATEL et al

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 466602 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC ELECTRONICS & TELECOM, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HASMUKH N. PATEL DAYS INN (FORMERLY MANOR MOTEL)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED ON JUNE 21, 1996 PLAINTIFF PAID $7.00 FEE.
EVERYTHING ENTER ON 6/16 &17/97 IS PRIOR TO THE RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HASMUKH N. PATEL HEARING SET FOR JUN-17-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC ELECTRONICS & TELECOM, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HASMUKH N. PATEL $1,518.50 PRINCIPAL, $1,505.35 INTEREST, $1,834.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,858.35 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ATLANTIC ELECTRONICS & TELECOM, INC. ASSIGNED TO RAMI V. PILLAI
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT OF JUN-17-1997, GRANTED
